vne_powered_to_3000ft.notes: Sea level to 3000 feet HD. Decrease VNE for ambient conditions per AIRSPEED LIMITATIONS placard (Figure 1-3). VNE at 93.5 to 100% TORQUE (takeoff power) is 100 KIAS, not to exceed placarded VNE.

vne_above_3000ft.notes: Above 3000 ft HD, VNE decreases per the AIRSPEED LIMITATIONS placard table (Figure 1-3); for example, at OAT 20°C and 4000 ft pressure altitude VNE = 133 KIAS. No single stated value; refer to placard table.

airspeed_indicator_green_arc_min.notes: Not explicitly stated in the text; instrument markings figure (1-5) referenced but values for green arc minimum not extractable from provided text.

airspeed_indicator_red_line.notes: Basic VNE red line is 140 KIAS at sea level to 3000 ft HD; decreases with altitude and temperature per placard.

power_on_max.notes: Maximum continuous NR power on. Continuous operation 99 to 100%.

power_on_min.notes: Minimum NR power on. Continuous operation 99 to 100%.

power_on_min_o320_variant.notes: No O-320 variant referenced in this document; not applicable.

power_off_max.notes: Maximum NR power off. RPM warning light (without audio) illuminates above 107%.

power_off_min.notes: Minimum NR power off. Continuous operation 85 to 107%. Caution: for autorotative training maintain steady state NR above 90%.

max_gross_standard_hp.notes: Maximum approved internal GW for takeoff and landing (basic helicopter, standard configuration).

max_gross_alpha_beta_beta_ii.notes: Maximum approved internal GW with kit 407-706-020 (Increased Internal Gross Weight) installed. Loads above 5250 lbs shall be carried on cargo hook.

max_per_seat_including_baggage.notes: Not explicitly stated per seat including baggage. Standard passenger weight assumed 170 lbs per seat for loading calculations.

max_per_baggage_compartment.notes: Maximum allowable weight in baggage compartment. Floor loading limit 86 lbs/sq ft (4.2 kg/100 sq cm).

min_solo_pilot_weight.notes: Minimum weight at fuselage station 65.0 is 170 lbs (77.1 kg). This applies to the pilot/front seat occupant to maintain CG.

max_operating_density_altitude.notes: Maximum operating altitude is 20,000 feet HD or 20,000 feet HP, whichever is lower.

speed_max_continuous.notes: Maximum continuous NG (Gas Producer RPM). Continuous operation 63 to 105%.

cht_max.notes: CHT (cylinder head temperature) not applicable to this turbine engine. MGT limits apply instead.

oil_temp_max.notes: Engine oil temperature maximum. Continuous operation 0 to 107°C.

oil_pressure_min_idle.notes: Minimum engine oil pressure below 79% NG RPM (idle range).

oil_pressure_min_flight.notes: Minimum engine oil pressure above 94% NG RPM (flight power range). Between 79-94% NG minimum is 90 PSI.

oil_pressure_max_flight.notes: Maximum engine oil pressure for continuous operation in flight. When 130 PSI is exceeded during start, operate at idle until pressure drops below 130 PSI.

oil_pressure_max_start_warmup.notes: Maximum engine oil pressure for cold starts only.

oil_quantity_min_takeoff.notes: Minimum engine oil quantity for takeoff not explicitly stated in the extracted text. Refer to BHT-407-MD-1.

carb_air_temp_caution_range_min.notes: Not applicable — this is a turbine engine (Rolls-Royce 250-C47B); no carburetor air temperature gauge.

carb_air_temp_caution_range_max.notes: Not applicable — turbine engine, no carburetor.

approved_grades: MIL-T-5624 Grade JP-4 / NATO F-40 (all temperatures)

required_equipment_for_dispatch: Snow deflector kit (BHT-407-FMS-4) when conducting flight operations in falling and/or blowing snow

flight_restrictions.notes: Intentional use of any power transient is prohibited.
Basic configured helicopter approved for day or night VFR nonicing conditions only.

flight_restrictions.item: ENG ANTI ICE ON in visible moisture below 5°C OAT
flight_restrictions.notes: ENG ANTI ICE shall be ON in visible moisture when OAT is below 5°C (40°F).

flight_restrictions.item: Maximum sideward/rearward flight or crosswind hover
flight_restrictions.notes: Maximum allowable airspeed for sideward and rearward flight or crosswind hover is 35 KTAS.
Limited to 10° side slopes, 10° nose up slope, or 5° nose down slope.
Maximum rate of climb is 2,000 feet per minute.
Rotor brake application limited to ground operation after engine shutdown and NR has decreased to 40% or lower. Engine starts with rotor brake engaged are prohibited.

flight_restrictions.item: Engine starts with rotor brake engaged
flight_restrictions.notes: Engine starts with rotor brake engaged are prohibited.
Minimum flight crew consists of one pilot who shall operate helicopter from right crew seat.
VNE is 100 KIAS with any door(s) removed, not to exceed placarded VNE. With litter door removed, left passenger door shall be removed.
VNE is 100 KIAS or placarded VNE, whichever is less, for steady state autorotation.

flight_restrictions.item: Snow deflector kit required in falling/blowing snow
flight_restrictions.notes: Snow deflector kit (BHT-407-FMS-4) shall be installed when conducting flight operations in falling and/or blowing snow.
FADEC system software shall be version 5.202.
Avoid continuous NP operations between 68.4% and 87.1%.
Use of takeoff power is limited to 100 KIAS, not to exceed placarded VNE.

faa_ad_95_26_04.note: FAA AD 95-26-04 is not referenced or discussed in this Flight Manual. No specific limitations attributable to this AD were found in the provided text.

limitations.notes: No reference to FAA AD 95-26-04 in the provided POH text.
